title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Poly ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Poly ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

nmpsdwa-53.130.en: No meningococcal primary series dose was administered

ompsdwa-54.130.en: One meningococcal primary series dose was administered

nmbdwa-46.128.en: No meningococcal booster dose was administered

csailt2y-33.42.en: Client's age is less than 2 years

csaimt2y-33.42.en: Client's age is more than 2 years

tlmdwalt3ya-68.111.en: The latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 3 years ago

tlmdwamt3ya-68.111.en: The latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 years ago

cindfmv-47.52.en: Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination

cidfmv-43.48.en: Client is due for meningococcal vaccination

tpsiccindfmbd-81.52.en: The primary series is complete. Client is not due for meningococcal booster dose.

tpsiccjirfmbdcacn-117.70.en: The primary series is complete. Clinical judgement is required for meningococcal booster dose. Create a clinical note
